haiku45.summary_excerpt: Critical failures: (1) `actions/checkout@v4` unpinned to SHA—violates security requirement; (2) Entire test harness missing—workflow doesn't run multiple test cases, capture to act-result.txt, validate outputs, or execute through act as mandated; (3) No fixture infrastructure (fixtures/ directory, fixture setup in workflow); (4) No actionlint validation. Workflow is single-run only. Scripts themselves well-written (good types, error handling), but workflow completely fails delivery requirements:

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent modular design separating pure logic from CLI/IO. Solid typing and error handling. Minor deduction in best practices for manually curling Bun instead of using the standard oven-sh/setup-bun action, but otherwise highly maintainable and clean.
